name: deconstruct-toolkit
description: Reverse-engineer polished artifacts (copy, document packs, UI, arguments, products, organizations) — surface design blueprints, hidden frameworks, rhetorical mechanisms, and intentional omissions. Grounded in Derrida, Barthes, Burke, Toulmin, Goffman, Lakoff, Cialdini, Brignull, Bhatia/Swales, Nielsen-Norman. 制作物・論証・製品の脱構築。BCG「バリュー・チェーンの脱構築」(Evans & Wurster) と山口周『武器になる哲学』の系譜。文物・論證・產品的逆向解構工具組。
